name: Into The Depths
short_description: Escape the lab and survive through dangerous monsters and military personnel
detailed_description:
You find yourself in an abandoned laboratory where every step could be your last. Riddles that challenge logic, frightening sounds from the darkness and an ever-changing atmosphere force you to keep your finger on the pulse.

But you are not alone. You are being hunted by a monster - a predator lurking in the shadows, and an elite squad of mercenaries ready to destroy anyone who gets in their way. You have a choice: survive by fighting, or try to outsmart your enemies by hiding and relying on your wits.

Collect first aid kits and useful devices. Solve puzzles to move forward, but be prepared: every mistake can cost you your life. And when the monster is close, your vision narrows, the music swells, and you understand - there is no choice, run!

Will you be able to survive all the horrors of the laboratory and find a way out, or will the darkness swallow you forever? Test your courage and logic in a game that keeps you in suspense from the first to the last moment.

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Russian
